runTitle: Playwright MCP Production QA - Frontend + AI Assistant v8.10.9 broad baseline refresh
coveredSurfaces: Vibe Coding modal tabs: 현재 도구 / 개발 환경 변화 / CI/CD
Vibe Coding CI/CD content aligns to local hook -> GitLab push -> validate -> deploy -> production
Vibe Coding modal close returns focus to trigger button
guest PIN login 4231 succeeds and returns to landing
system start countdown begins at 4초 and reaches /system-boot -> /dashboard
dashboard render with 15 total / 14 online / 1 warning / 0 risk and resource top5
AI sidebar opens with engine Ready state

expertAssessments.rationale: Core route, dashboard, and AI sidebar/chat broad surface was exercised on live production with concrete UI and API checkpoints.
Deployment identity, version metadata, usage budget, and production route readiness are aligned with the current GitLab-first topology.
AI core surface was verified via sidebar readiness and one live CPU-summary prompt, but fullscreen/reporter/analyst variants remain outside this broad pack.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Run a deeper AI advanced-surface pack when the next runtime-facing change lands.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed during broad production QA; effective 3.2825 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed usage spike.

notes: Historical artifact debt acknowledged on 2026-04-08: contemporaneous durable evidence was not preserved at record time, so this run remains artifact-free by design.

artifactDebt.reason: This release-facing broad run was recorded before durable artifact retention rules were enforced. No contemporaneous repo-tracked evidence survived, so safe backfill is not available.
